chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.06 of 2023 Syed Ali Imran Versus JS Bank Limited & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA 159/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA 160/23 Dated: 18.10.2023 None present. -.-.- Appellant and his counsel are called absent. Since beginning appellant and his counsel are not regular and punctual in appearance. They were called absent on 01.02.2023 followed by absence on 08.02.2023. They were lastly called absent on 17.08.2023 when the Court noticed that Court fee has not been appended and three days’ time was granted. Though the Court fee has now appended but neither appellant nor his counsel is an attendance. There is no intimation either. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
